title: Citi and Booking.com Team to Streamline Travel

title: Just Eat Takeaway.com reports wider 2022 loss after booking $4.87 billion impairment
text: Just Eat Takeaway.com NV on Wednesday reported a widened 2022 net loss after booking a 4.6 billion euro ($4.87 billion) impairment in its accounts due to past equity funded acquisitions, and backed its full-year forecast.
